lines: How fast can animals run? Let's compare.
Human. The fastest person alive hits 45 kilometers per hour.
Elephant. Surprisingly quick at 40 km per hour. Slower than us.
Grizzly Bear. Don't try to outrun one. 56 km per hour.
Lion. The king charges at 80 km per hour.
Pronghorn Antelope. Built for speed. 89 km per hour. Faster than any predator in North America.
Cheetah. The fastest land animal on Earth. 120 km per hour. Zero to 100 in 3 seconds.
Peregrine Falcon. The fastest animal alive. 390 km per hour in a dive.
